settings.heading: Pick your parts
settings.text: Decide what components you want. Pick your kimono, belt and/or pants, or any combination of the three. All parts can be different sizes as well.

settings.heading: Customize your gi
settings.text: Pick your size, colors and your graphics to add to your kimono, belt and/or pant. Our design tool lets you customize your gi exactly how you want it in 3D. Make it unique and one of a kind.

settings.heading: Review and check out
settings.text: Once you place your order we will send you a 3D model of your personal gi. You can ask any questions and once we have your approval we will begin making your gi and send tracking details when it ships.
